# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio mesh configuration (meshConfig) that allows outbound traffic to any external service. Set outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY so services can call external APIs without ServiceEntry definitions. This provides maximum flexibility for microservices that integrate with various external APIs.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for service mesh security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  mesh: |-
    defaultConfig:
      discoveryAddress: istiod.istio-system.svc:15012
      proxyMetadata: {}
      tracing:
        zipkin:
          address: zipkin.istio-system:9411
    enablePrometheusMerge: true
    rootNamespace: istio-system
    trustDomain: cluster.local
    outboundTrafficPolicy:
      mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    accessLogEncoding: JSON
    defaultServiceExportTo:
      - "."
    defaultVirtualServiceExportTo:
      - "."
    defaultDestinationRuleExportTo:
      - "."
  meshNetworks: 'networks: {}'
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-apis-whitelist
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.googleapis.com"
    - "*.github.com"
    - "api.stripe.com"
    - "api.twilio.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            ports: ["443"]
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: istio-egressgateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: egressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - "*.googleapis.com"
        - "*.github.com"
        - "api.stripe.com"
        - "api.twilio.com"
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: direct-external-through-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.googleapis.com"
    - "*.github.com"
    - "api.stripe.com"
    - "api.twilio.com"
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - istio-egressgateway
  tls:
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - mesh
          port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - "*.googleapis.com"
            - "*.github.com"
            - "api.stripe.com"
            - "api.twilio.com"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: istio-egressgateway.istio-system.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - istio-egressgateway
          port: 443
          sniHosts:
            - "*.googleapis.com"
            - "*.github.com"
            - "api.stripe.com"
            - "api.twilio.com"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: dummy.local
            port:
              number: 443
          weight: 100
